pages.title: Best Creatine Supplements 2026 — Ranked by Purity & Value
pages.meta: The 5 best creatine supplements of 2026 — Creapure® monohydrate, HCL, and certified options ranked by evidence, purity, and value.

products.name: Creatine (Creapure®)
products.blurb: Pharmaceutical-grade from Creapure® — the gold-standard German facility. >99.9% purity. NSF Certified for Sport. 5g per serving, unflavoured, mixes into anything.

products.name: Creatine Monohydrate
products.blurb: Pure creatine monohydrate at ~$0.10 per serving. Lab-verified purity, available up to 5kg. For those who just want the ingredient without the packaging premium.

products.name: MuscleBlaze Creatine Monohydrate
products.blurb: Micronised creatine monohydrate at one of the best price points in South Asia. Widely available, good quality control, popular among Indian lifters.

products.name: Creatine HCL
products.blurb: If GI discomfort on monohydrate is genuine, HCL's superior solubility may help. Clean label, no loading phase needed. Don't pay the premium expecting better muscle gains — evidence doesn't support it.

products.name: Creatine Monohydrate
products.blurb: Creapure-sourced, third-party tested, 5g dose. If you already order Transparent Labs, adding their creatine simplifies your stack.

pages.title: Best Fat Burner Supplements 2026 — Honest Rankings
pages.meta: The 5 best fat burner supplements of 2026 separated from the overpriced caffeine pills. Ranked on evidence, clinical dosing, and transparency.

products.name: Instant Knockout Cut
products.blurb: Originally developed for MMA fighters. Most transparent fat burner available — 500mg green tea at 50% EGCG, Capsimax® cayenne, glucomannan. Zero prop blends.

products.name: PhenQ
products.blurb: Five mechanisms: thermogenesis, appetite suppression, energy, fat oxidation, mood. α-Lacys Reset® + InnoSlim + Capsimax provides comprehensive fat-loss support.

products.name: Leanbean
products.blurb: Designed for women with lower stimulant profile and 3g glucomannan — the clinical dose for appetite suppression. Good for caffeine-sensitive users.

products.name: Citrus Burn
products.blurb: P-synephrine as the primary thermogenic — a non-CNS alternative to caffeine. Berberine for glucose control, EGCG for fat oxidation. Best for stimulant-avoiding users.

products.name: Vintage Burn
products.blurb: Most honest budget fat burner available. Green coffee + green tea + 150mg caffeine at ~$1.50/day delivers real thermogenic value.

pages.title: Best Mass Gainers 2026 — Ranked by Caloric Quality & Value
pages.meta: Best mass gainers 2026 ranked by caloric quality, protein content, carbohydrate source, cost per calorie, and honest verdict on who needs a mass gainer.

products.name: ON Pro Gainer (Lean Mass)
cons: Not for extreme hardgainers (650 kcal only)

pages.title: Best Nootropics Under $30/Month — Ranked by Evidence Quality
pages.meta: Best nootropics under $30/month 2026 — L-theanine, Magtein, Bacopa, Ashwagandha, and Lion's Mane ranked by clinical evidence quality, effective doses, and real monthly cost.

products.name: L-Theanine 200mg
products.blurb: Best daily cognitive base. Reduces anxiety, enhances alpha brain waves, synergises with caffeine at 2:1 ratio. Fastest onset (45 min) and most consistent daily effect of any compound at this price.

products.name: Magnesium L-Threonate (Magtein®)
products.blurb: Only magnesium form proven to raise CNS magnesium. Memory and anxiety improvement at 4-6 weeks. Life Extension Neuro-Mag uses the same Magtein® compound as Momentous at $22/month vs $49/month.

products.name: Ashwagandha KSM-66
products.blurb: Most consistent cortisol and anxiety reduction available in this price range. Testosterone increases are modest but real. Requires 4-6 weeks. Choose KSM-66 or Sensoril standardised extracts only — gen

products.name: Bacopa Monnieri (Bacognize® / KeenMind)
products.blurb: Best nootropic for memory formation and learning retention. Requires the longest onset (8-12 weeks) of any compound here. Use standardised extracts — generic Bacopa powder produces inconsistent result

products.name: Lion's Mane Mushroom
products.brand: Best pick: Host Defense / standardised fruiting body
products.blurb: Most promising emerging nootropic for long-term neuroplasticity. Nerve growth factor stimulation mechanism is compelling. Human evidence is more limited than L-theanine or Bacopa. Fruiting body extrac

pages.title: Best Pre-Workout Supplements 2026 — Ranked by Science
pages.meta: The 5 best pre-workout supplements of 2026 ranked by clinical dosing, ingredient transparency, and real performance.

products.name: Transparent Labs BULK Black
products.blurb: Every major ingredient at clinical dose — 8,000mg citrulline, 4g beta-alanine, dual-caffeine system. Zero hidden blends. The benchmark for pre-workout transparency.

products.name: Gorilla Mode
products.blurb: 9,000mg citrulline — the highest dose of any mainstream pre-workout. 5g betaine at full clinical dose. Outstanding pump and power output.

products.name: Pulse Pre-Workout
products.blurb: Clinical citrulline dose, CarnoSyn® beta-alanine, natural sweeteners, zero artificial dyes. Lower stim profile suits those who want performance without jitters.

products.name: Pre-Kaged Elite
products.blurb: Informed Sport certified with solid 6.5g citrulline and clean electrolyte addition. Well-tested formula slightly let down by an undisclosed focus blend.

products.name: C4 Original Pre-Workout
products.blurb: The right entry point for beginners. 150mg caffeine, manageable doses across the board, ~$1/serving. When you outgrow it, upgrade to BULK Black.

pages.title: Best Protein Powders 2026 — Ranked by Amino Profile & Value
pages.meta: The 5 best protein powders of 2026 ranked by amino acid profile, cost per gram, mixability, and third-party testing.

products.name: Gold Standard 100% Whey
products.blurb: The benchmark for 15+ years. 24g protein, 5.5g BCAAs, Informed Sport certified, best-in-class mixability. 20+ flavours. Start here and stay here.

products.name: ISO100 Hydrolyzed Whey
products.blurb: Zero lactose, 25g hydrolysed whey isolate, ultra-fast absorption, Informed Sport certified. The cleanest whey available. Best for lactose-intolerant users.

products.name: Impact Whey Protein
products.blurb: ~$0.80 per serving in bulk — best cost-per-gram available. 80+ flavours, 21g protein. Best for budget-conscious buyers hitting daily protein targets.

products.name: Sport Organic Plant Protein
products.blurb: Best plant protein with complete amino acid profile. 30g protein from pea + rice + chia. USDA Organic, NSF Certified for Sport.

products.name: Gold Standard 100% Casein
products.blurb: Digests in 6–8 hours — ideal before bed for overnight muscle protein synthesis. 28g protein per serving with ON's reliable quality.

pages.title: Best Sleep Supplements 2026 — Science-Backed Rankings
pages.meta: The 5 best sleep supplements of 2026 — ranked by ingredient evidence, bioavailability, and real sleep tracking data. Melatonin, magnesium, L-theanine, and full-formula options.

products.name: Yu Sleep Nano Formula
products.blurb: The most innovative sleep supplement we've tested. Nano-emulsion delivery achieves ~95% bioavailability vs ~20% from standard capsules. Multi-mechanism formula — GABA, melatonin, L-theanine, 5-HTP. 90-day sleep tracker data shows consistent deep sleep improvement.

products.name: Magnesium L-Threonate
products.blurb: Magtein® — the only magnesium form clinically shown to cross the blood-brain barrier effectively. Part of Andrew Huberman's sleep protocol. Noticeably improves deep sleep quality. NSF Certified for Sport.

products.name: L-Theanine 200mg
products.blurb: Suntheanine®-sourced at 200mg — promotes alpha brain waves and reduces sleep latency without morning grogginess. Non-habit-forming. Works synergistically with low-dose melatonin. Exceptional value.

products.name: Melatonin 0.5mg
products.blurb: Most products dose melatonin at 5-10mg — 10-30× higher than research supports. Life Extension's 0.5mg is evidence-backed per MIT research (0.3mg equals 10mg for sleep onset) without suppressing natural production.

products.name: Sleep & Recover
products.blurb: Andrew Huberman's three-ingredient sleep stack — magnesium threonate, L-theanine, and apigenin — combined at clinical doses in one product. NSF Certified for Sport.
